## Description
Please describe the changes in this pull request and the issues they address.

Fixes # (issue link)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification & Testing
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:
1. Smart Contract Test: `cargo test` in the contract workspace.
2. Frontend Compilation: `npx tsc --noEmit` in the frontend directory.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README accordingly.
- [ ] All unit tests pass successfully.
- [ ] The Next.js project builds cleanly without warnings.
